subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken forth that whereby all things have been drawn unto Him, and through which His path and His balance have been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بما اجتذبت به الاشیاء و ظهر به صراطه و میزانه و ما کان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the power of words; of speech, @prayer for forgiveness
